name: Granola
summary: Pull meeting notes + transcripts into 1-inbox/transcripts/ — our own dual-auth connector (Granola public API, with automatic fallback to the local desktop-app session on any plan; does not use the Granola MCP).

secrets.label: API key
secrets.note: Optional. Needed only for the portable public API (Business/Enterprise). Without it the connector uses the signed-in Granola desktop app on this machine.

docs.instructions: Preferred (portable): in the Granola desktop app, Settings → Connectors → API keys → Create new key → tick 'Personal notes' (add 'Public notes' for team notes) → Generate API Key → set GRANOLA_API_KEY. Requires a Business/Enterprise plan. No paid plan? Just sign in to the Granola desktop app — the connector falls back to its local session automatically.
